documentation.description: Distance sensor information for an onboard rangefinder.

record_types.name: Distance_Sensor

fields.name: Min_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [cm]
Minimum distance the sensor can measure

fields.name: Max_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [cm]
Maximum distance the sensor can measure

fields.name: Orientation
fields.description:
Direction the sensor faces. downward-facing: ROTATION_PITCH_270,
upward-facing: ROTATION_PITCH_90, backward-facing:
ROTATION_PITCH_180, forward-facing: ROTATION_NONE, left-facing:
ROTATION_YAW_90, right-facing: ROTATION_YAW_270

fields.name: Covariance
fields.description:
Units: [cm^2]
Measurement variance. Max standard deviation is 6cm. UINT8_MAX if
unknown.

subprograms.name: Decode

Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
